rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO EAGLE BAR LLC, FORMERLY KNOWN AS VS. VOULA NIKITOPOULOS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 22, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANTS VOULA NIKITOPOULOS, DINA NIKITOPOULOS AND ESTATE OF JOHN NIKITOPOULOS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS is continued to December 7, 2021 on Court's own motion. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC VS. MANUEL NAVARRO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance And Production Of Documents At Deposition; And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 22, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANT MANUEL NAVARRO'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AT DEPOSITION, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS is continued to November 29, 2021 per the order of the presiding judge. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JIMMY CHERRY JR VS. WINDY R BRYANT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Require Undertaking; Stay Proceedings; Reclassify Case; And / Or Consolidate Cases
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 22, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANT WINDY CHERRY'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO REQUIRE UNDERTAKING, STAY PROCEEDINGS, RECLASSIFY CASE, AND/OR CONSOLIDATE CASES is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Motion filed on November 12, 2021 for a hearing on November 22, 2021. No proof of service located on file. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
